Hero.name: Hamidreza Fallahi
Hero.tagline: Architecting scalable, SEO-optimized frontends for complex systems
Hero.description: I specialize in frontend engineering with React, Next.js and TypeScript, with experience building management panels, complex ERP systems, e-commerce platforms and production-grade PWA applications. I have worked on enterprise projects involving challenges such as Master-Detail forms, IndexedDB-based state management and scalable maintainable architectures.

experience.subtitle: Years of Professional Experience
experience.description: Frontend engineering for production-grade systems including large-scale ERP platforms and complex administrative panels

projects.subtitle: Real-World Projects
projects.description: From complex ERP systems to e-commerce platforms and PWA applications

technical.subtitle: Focus on SEO & Performance
technical.description: Building fast, maintainable and SEO-friendly interfaces using modern architecture and server-side rendering

arianErp.title: Enterprise ERP System
arianErp.description: An ERP system designed to manage organizational processes including finance, human resources, production and logistics.
arianErp.problem: Handling a large number of list pages, forms, documents and custom pages with non-standard structures.
arianErp.solution: Developing dynamic and reusable components for forms, lists and tables with a strong focus on scalability.
arianErp.role: Lead Developer responsible for architecture decisions and implementation of dynamic system layers.

arianTech.title: Arian Tech Public Site
arianTech.description: A lightweight promotional website built for a large ERP web application without external libraries, focusing on performance and simplicity.
arianTech.problem: Implementing all required interactions without additional libraries to maximize website speed and performance.
arianTech.solution: Using vanilla JavaScript to build interactive sections and custom functionality.
arianTech.role: Lead Developer responsible for implementing server-side rendered sections and overall system structure.

candyRose.title: CandyRose Full-stack E-Commerce Platform
candyRose.description: A complete e-commerce platform with essential shopping features, designed with a scalable architecture and extensibility in mind.
candyRose.problem: Transforming a simple store into a marketplace where multiple sellers can manage products with their own prices, inventory and promotional rules including discount codes.
candyRose.solution: Separating entities and designing flexible data relationships to support marketplace features, promotions and discount management.
candyRose.role: Implemented the complete project architecture and development as a personal full-stack project.

About.title: Frontend Development with focus on scalability, user experience and code quality
About.paragraph1: I specialize in building complex, data-driven interfaces — especially ERP systems, enterprise dashboards and applications with Master-Detail forms, multi-level permissions and real-time data flows.
About.paragraph2: My main stack includes Next.js, TypeScript, Redux Toolkit and RTK Query. I focus on performance optimization, offline capabilities with IndexedDB, SEO through server-side rendering and clean architecture for long-term maintainability.
About.paragraph3: If you need a frontend engineer who thinks beyond the UI layer — considering data flow, state architecture and product stability — let's talk.

Projects.title: Projects that show how I think and build
Projects.subtitle: From large-scale ERP systems to SEO-optimized e-commerce platforms — every project reflects decisions around architecture, performance and maintainability.

erp.title: Enterprise ERP Dashboard
erp.description: A complete ERP frontend with complex Master-Detail forms, multi-level access control, dynamic workflows and offline support using IndexedDB. Built for large data volumes and long-term scalability.
erp.tags: Next.js, TypeScript, Redux Toolkit, RTK Query, IndexedDB, Ant Design

ecommerce.title: SEO-Driven E-Commerce Platform
ecommerce.description: An online store built with server-side rendering for strong SEO performance, PWA capabilities for offline access and a fast shopping experience connected to an ASP.NET Core backend.

designSystem.title: Admin Panel Design System
designSystem.description: A component-driven design system for a large management panel using Ant Design and Material UI, focused on consistency, reusability and faster feature development.
designSystem.tags: React, TypeScript, Ant Design, Material UI, Reusable Components

project.title: react-persian-range-picker
project.description: A lightweight, fully typed date range picker supporting both Jalali and Gregorian calendars. Built with React and TypeScript — production-ready for real-world enterprise applications.
project.tags: React, TypeScript, Jalali Calendar, Open Source

Contact.title: Looking for a Frontend Engineer who delivers production-ready code?
Contact.description: Available for projects involving complex admin panels, ERP systems, data-driven dashboards and frontend performance optimization. Experienced with React, Next.js and scalable state architectures.
